summary: Verified duel image fix: all 18 flagcdn.com URLs return HTTP 200 with content-type image/png. No unsplash/wikimedia URLs remain in backend. GET /api/rooms/{code}/state correctly serves duel.question.img field with valid flagcdn URLs during image duels (confirmed via live game session with 3 image duels observed).
passed: All 18 flagcdn.com/w320/{cc}.png URLs return HTTP 200 with content-type image/png (sa, ae, fr, jp, br, eg, ca, tr, de, es, ma, jo, it, gb, kw, qa, lb, us)
POST /api/rooms/create, /join, /start, /attack work correctly and trigger duels
GET /api/rooms/{code}/state returns duel.question.img with valid flagcdn URL (e.g. https://flagcdn.com/w320/us.png) during image duels
Non-image (text) capitals questions also served correctly (e.g. 'عاصمة البرازيل؟')
